basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Research Scientist I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://nitc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. (or Integrated M.Tech) in Computer Science & Engineering/Information Technology or equivalent qualification with the required marks are eligible to apply for these Research Scientist I vacancies. The offline application process for NIT Calicut Research Scientist I Recr

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Relaxation will be given as per the Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. (or Integrated M.Tech) M.E./M.Tech, B.E./B.Tech
qualification.details: Research Scientist I: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. (or Integrated M.Tech) in Computer Sc. & Engg./ Information Technology or equivalent from an Institute of National Importance/ AICTE-approved University/Institution with minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA (out of 10) in M.E./M.Tech. OR B.E./B.Tech. from an Institute of National Importance with minimum 85% marks or 9.0 CGPA (out of 10). For SC/ST/PwD candidates, a relaxation of 5% marks or 0.5 CGPA will be considered. Desirable: GATE/NET qualification, proficiency in computer programming.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56,000/- Per month + 20% HRA (if accommodation is not provided by the Institute)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Project Research Scientist position?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. (or Integrated M.Tech) in Computer Science & Engineering/ Information Technology or equivalent from a reputed institution with specific minimum marks or CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Research Scientist position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000/- plus 20% HRA, provided accommodation is not offered by the institute.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Research Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The offline interview for the Project Research Scientist position is scheduled to be held on 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut).

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is R.11020/01/2026-GTA/ISC/HR.
